author: Austin Crawford
title: Cottage Chic Décor Reopening
summary: Cottage Chic
content:
Cottage Chic

Décor is reopening it’s doors on Saturday, February 3rd!

We’ve refreshed all the spaces and are bringing in several new vendors. 

 

They are:

* Ellen of “Stand for Something” - unique designs for

everyday finds;

* Tracy & Jorge of “T J Craft Wood Designs” – custom

home furnishings and décor;

* Shannon and Gracyn of “Coastal Vintage” - vintage

clothing & accessories;

* Lisa of “Mantra Candles” – handmade in RI candles and

reed diffusers; and

* Trish of “Fig ‘n Dandy” – soaps and spa goods

author: Austin Crawford
title: Where-on-Earth Bird Walk
summary: So what exactly is a Where-on-Earth Bird Walk?
content:
So what exactly is a Where-on-Earth Bird Walk?

It is a bird walk that we take individually on the same day (at any time of day), and make a list of birds that you each see. You send your list to Kim Gaffett at kim.gaffett@tnc.org along with information about the time of day and where you observed birds.  Kim will compile everyone’s list into one “community” list, and share the sightings with all the participants – thus a bird walk that we do together, but at a social distance.

So, please join us – bird enthusiasts near & far and young & old – in taking your own Where-on-Earth Bird Walk  at any time that fits your schedule.  

Remember this is not limited to those who are presently on Block Island. Anyone, anywhere can join the fun. 

Any Questions, contact Kim at kim.gaffett@tnc.org

author: Austin Crawford
title: 32nd Annual Holiday Shopping Stroll
summary: Do your holiday shopping right here on Block Island this year!
content:
Do your holiday shopping right here on Block Island this year!
Our downtown shops and outdoor holiday marketplace offer a wide array of unique gifts for everyone on your list. There will be food and drinks to fuel your Block Island shopping adventure.
Grab some friends and take a ferry ride to Block Island - or if you're already here come into town - for a festive, fun, and special holiday shopping experience. Don’t miss out on participating in the holiday stroll raffle!
If you're coming to the Holiday Stroll and want to stay overnight, contact one of the inns or hotels that will be open to accommodate your stay.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Pride 2023
summary: Block Island is celebrating its 3rd Annual Block Island Pride! Starting on Thursday, September 14th through Sunday, September 17th. There will be many fun activities going on. Check out the event schedule below.
content:
Block Island is celebrating its 3rd Annual Block Island Pride! Starting on Thursday, September 14th through Sunday, September 17th. There will be many fun activities going on. Check out the event schedule below. 

 

Thursday, September 14 

Rainbow Tie-Dye at the Traveling Seamstress 4:00-6:00 pm

Still Life Drawing at The Darius Inn 4:00-6:00 pm

Drag Queen Bingo at The Island Free Library 5:00-6:00 pm

 

 

Friday, September 15 

Austin Morin's Art Happening at The Spring Street Gallery 5:00-7:00 PM

Life Drawing Class at The Spring Street Gallery 7:00- 8:15 pm *RSVP (21+)

Liquid Dance floor Drag Queen Party at Captain Nick's (21+) 9:00-1:00 am

 

 

Saturday, September 16

Drag Queen Story Hour at The Island Free Library 10:00-11:00 am

Mermaid Pride March begins at The Ocean View Pavilion 12:00-1:00 pm

Drag Brunch at Yellow Kittens (Family Friendly) 1:30-4:00 pm

Soundwaves' "To Wong Foo Thanks For Everything" (PG 13) at Town Beach 6:30 pm

Club Soda House & Techno Pride Rave (21+) 10:00-1:00 AM

 

 

Sunday, September 17

Kim Gaffett's Queerness in Nature Walk (Location TBD) 2:00-4:00

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Inshore Fishing Tournament
summary: This tournament is catch & release for striped bass and bluefish. A photo of the fish with the regulation measuring device will be uploaded to the tournament smart phone app.  Real time results will be available. Fish must be entered immediately after capture with the location logged when photo is taken.
content:
This tournament is catch & release for striped bass and bluefish. A photo of the fish with the regulation measuring device will be uploaded to the tournament smart phone app.  Real time results will be available. Fish must be entered immediately after capture with the location logged when photo is taken.

  • Youth division (under 13 years old) one prize for each shore species (2 prizes), and one prize for each boat species (4 prizes). $200 in gear and tackle.
  • Adult shore division 1st ($500 in gear and tackle) for shore division species bluefish and striped bass.
  • Adult boat division, 1st ($500in gear and tackle)) for four boat division species (striped bass, bluefish, fluke and black sea bass).
  • Fly fishing shore division, 1st ($500 in gear and tackle) for shore division species bluefish and striped bass.
  • Fly fishing boat division, 1st ($500 in gear and tackle) for boat division species bluefish and striped bass.
  • Wind farm photo division, three photo prizes ($200 gift card), all taken in wind farm area with wind farm in photo… most scenic, best fish, and best team photo.
  • Team prize:  The team that gets the most tournament prizes (including youth, adult and photo divisions) will be awarded the team price of a $500 gift card.

100 % of registration fees will benefit the Volunteer Block Island Fire and Rescue Department

See the link below for registration.
address: Block Island New Shoreham Washington County

title: BI Medical Center Silent Auction & Fundraiser
summary: The 2023 BIMC Virtual Fundraiser & Silent Auction is OPEN!
content:
The 2023 BIMC Virtual Fundraiser & Silent Auction is OPEN!

All items are OPEN FOR BIDDING. Visit bimc2023.givesmart.com to register & get bidding before the auction closes on Saturday, July 15.
 
Don't forget, you can also make a one-time donation or purchase an instant item at any time.

 

Thank you for all of your generous support!

Food specials + icy cold Red Stripe deals all day.
Followed by an Island style dance party featuring Ragga, Reggae, Ska+ Dancehall
 

One Pub One Love

author: Austin Crawford
title: Carrie Megan ~ Skyscapes
summary: Carrie Megan focuses on the fleeting nature of the sky. Always a fascination to her, the sky, with its swift moving clouds, ever changing light, and kaleidoscopic color provides endless inspiration and subject matter for her imaginative sky paintings.
content: Carrie Megan focuses on the fleeting nature of the sky. Always a fascination to her, the sky, with its swift moving clouds, ever changing light, and kaleidoscopic color provides endless inspiration and subject matter for her imaginative sky paintings.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Kate Knapp ~ Recent Work
summary: A continued exploration of the beauty that abounds on Block Island with paintings of favorite island locations and views
content: A continued exploration of the beauty that abounds on Block Island with paintings of favorite island locations and views

author: Austin Crawford
title: Paranormal Party Weekend Block Island Ghost Tours
summary: There is still room to join us for the Paranormal Party Weekend June 23-25 with @timweisbergof @spooky_southcoast
content:
There is still room to join us for the Paranormal Party Weekend June 23-25 with @timweisbergof @spooky_southcoast 
Tickets cost $79/person or $145 if you book 2 people together. That's a savings of $13 (our favorite number)
What do you get for that price? Well...
● A full weekend with us, @thelegitparanormal& @timweisberg 
○ Free drinks at the Friday night welcome party
● Psychic Gallery Reading with @bewitchedofscituate 
○ Magic Show with @magicianrobmartin
● Ghost Tour with @ricklysik including complimentary flashlights and "I survived" stickers
○ Hear Tim's stories & experiences
● Test your wit on a custom scavenger hunt
○ First drink free at our Saturday night after party @clubsodabi
● Free farewell breakfast Sunday morning. 

Additional costs for you. Hotel room for Fri & Sat night. They are filling fast! Food for the weekend except Sun morning. 

Get your tickets on blockislandghosttours.com or call us at 401-477-2979

author: Austin Crawford
title: Tri-State Canyon Shoot Out Fishing Tournament
summary: JB Tackle hosts this Annual fishing event with competitions for a great variety of species: Albacore, Bigeye Tuna, Blue Marlin, Bluefin Tuna, Dolphin, Flounder, Sailfish, Sea Bass, Spearfish, Swordfish, Wahoo, White Marlin, Yellowfin Tuna. This year the tournament will be based out of Champlin's. So come down and check out the boats and the fish. The afternoon weigh-ins are not to be missed!
content: JB Tackle hosts this Annual fishing event with competitions for a great variety of species: Albacore, Bigeye Tuna, Blue Marlin, Bluefin Tuna, Dolphin, Flounder, Sailfish, Sea Bass, Spearfish, Swordfish, Wahoo, White Marlin, Yellowfin Tuna. This year the tournament will be based out of Champlin's. So come down and check out the boats and the fish. The afternoon weigh-ins are not to be missed!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Race Week 2023 – Storm Trysail 30th Year
summary: Block Island hosts some colorful events, but there may be nothing quite as spectacular as racing sailboats cutting through the waters surrounding the island during the annual Block Island Race Week.
content:
Block Island hosts some colorful events, but there may be nothing quite as spectacular as racing sailboats cutting through the waters surrounding the island during the annual Block Island Race Week.

Brought to you by The Storm Trysail Club,  Block Island Yacht Club, and Block Island Community Sailing

author: BI Chamber
title: 31st Block Island Holiday Stroll
summary: Description:
content:
Description:

2022 Block Island Annual Holiday Stroll!  

Holiday Stroll Brochure

Do your holiday shopping on Block Island at the Holiday Stroll, November 25th through 27th.

Our downtown shops and outdoor holiday marketplace offer a wide array of unique gifts for everyone on your list and there will be food and drinks to fuel your Block Island shopping adventure.

Grab some friends and take a ferry ride to Block Island - or if you're already here come into town - for a festive, fun, and special holiday shopping experience! 

If you're coming to the Holiday Stroll and want to stay overnight, contact one of the inns or hotels that will be open to accommodate your stay.

author: Austin Crawford
title: 45th Annual Run Around the Block
summary: The 45th running of the Run Around the Block 15K Road Race is on Saturday, September 10th. We have a new course with a new finish line! The big hill is still there.  After a two year break, we are excited to hold this race. The proceeds from the race go to the Block Island Lion's Club and Michael and Daniel Batchelder Memorial Scholarship Fund.
content:
The 45th running of the Run Around the Block 15K Road Race is on Saturday, September 10th. We have a new course with a new finish line! The big hill is still there.  After a two year break, we are excited to hold this race. The proceeds from the race go to the Block Island Lion's Club and Michael and Daniel Batchelder Memorial Scholarship Fund.

 

To sign up for the race click the link below.

content: One Love one pub. Poor People's Pub Jamaican Independence day party. Jamaican food specials, icy cold Red Stripes all day. Island Dance Party @ 10pm!

author: Austin Crawford
title: 9th Annual Block Island Giant Shark Tournament
summary: Bring your team and your family for a vacation on beautiful Block Island. Located close to some of the best fishing grounds in New England, a great harbor, great restaurants, world class beaches, and the event is being hosted by Payne’s Dock which is one of Block Islands Premier Marinas . Please send your application and entry fee as soon as possible as slip space can only be guaranteed to the first 50 boats. This is a Fishing Tournament for fishermen, run by fishermen with the concerns of the fishermen at heart. Note our extended fishing times to allow our participants to get both the first morning bite, and the late afternoon bite.
content:
Bring your team and your family for a vacation on beautiful Block Island. Located close to some of the best fishing grounds in New England, a great harbor, great restaurants, world class beaches, and the event is being hosted by Payne’s Dock which is one of Block Islands Premier Marinas . Please send your application and entry fee as soon as possible as slip space can only be guaranteed to the first 50 boats. This is a Fishing Tournament for fishermen, run by fishermen with the concerns of the fishermen at heart. Note our extended fishing times to allow our participants to get both the first morning bite, and the late afternoon bite.

 

http://blockislandgiantsharktournament.com

author: Austin Crawford
title: Tri-State Canyon Shootout
summary: The Tri-State Shootout is considered one of the Northeast premier tournaments. All events hosted by Tri-State Tournaments are designed to combine camaraderie in fishing along with serious sportsmanship, as well as family fun. We are fortunate to bring together one of the largest sport fishing fleets in the northeast with some of the biggest names in the fishing industry to create a contagious atmosphere of fishing and fun.
content:
The Tri-State Shootout is considered one of the Northeast premier tournaments. All events hosted by Tri-State Tournaments are designed to combine camaraderie in fishing along with serious sportsmanship, as well as family fun. We are fortunate to bring together one of the largest sport fishing fleets in the northeast with some of the biggest names in the fishing industry to create a contagious atmosphere of fishing and fun.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Webinar for restaurant and food truck operators
summary: The Block Island Chamber of Commerce is hosting a webinar for restaurant and food truck operators with Usefull Founder and CEO Alison Rogers on Tuesday, Feb. 22 at noon. Usefull has created a reusable take-out container service that is designed to reduce waste in a safe, sanitary, and convenient manner. To join the Zoom meeting, call: (929) 205-6099 (New York). Meeting ID: 435 630 9898. Passcode: 420172. To find out more about Usefull, visit www.usefull.us.
